title: Macro Diorama
description: Ce style reproduit l'illusion d'un modèle réduit miniature grâce à l'application précise de techniques de photographie à bascule et décentrement (tilt-shift). Il se caractérise par une profondeur de champ considérablement réduite, avec une étroite bande horizontale de mise au point nette encadrée par un flou d'arrière-plan (bokeh) dense et lisse. L'esthétique se distingue par des angles de vue surélevés, des couleurs vibrantes à forte saturation, des textures mates immaculées rappelant le plastique ou le bois peint, et des sources de lumière artificielle chaudes et éclatantes qui renforcent l'atmosphère ludique de jouet.
description_en: This style replicates the illusion of a miniature scale model through the precise application of tilt-shift photography techniques. It features a dramatically shallow depth of field with a narrow horizontal band of razor-sharp focus, flanked by heavy, smooth bokeh in the foreground and background. The aesthetic is characterized by elevated viewing angles, vibrant high-chroma colors, pristine matte textures resembling plastic or painted wood, and warm, glowing artificial light sources that enhance the toy-like, whimsical atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style reproduit l'illusion d'un modèle réduit miniature grâce à l'application précise de techniques de photographie à bascule et décentrement (tilt-shift). Il se caractérise par une profondeur de champ considérablement réduite, avec une étroite bande horizontale de mise au point nette encadrée par un flou d'arrière-plan (bokeh) dense et lisse. L'esthétique se distingue par des angles de vue surélevés, des couleurs vibrantes à forte saturation, des textures mates immaculées rappelant le plastique ou le bois peint, et des sources de lumière artificielle chaudes et éclatantes qui renforcent l'atmosphère ludique de jouet.
prompt: Photorealistic tilt-shift photography and macro miniature faking rendering technique. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution creates a striking diorama illusion, transforming the scene into what appears to be an intricately crafted physical scale model. Lighting consists of soft, diffused ambient illumination that mimics high-end studio lighting on a miniature set, punctuated by intensely warm, glowing practical light sources that create a cozy, whimsical atmosphere. The color science relies on a highly saturated, vibrant palette where {{primary_color}} establishes the dominant foundational hue, heavily contrasted by striking {{accent_color}} highlights and grounded by smooth, cool {{secondary_color}} shadows. Textures are pristine and idealized, deliberately lacking real-world grit to resemble flawless matte plastic, smooth painted resin, and polished wood surfaces. The defining spatial dynamic is an extremely shallow depth of field driven by aggressive macro lens simulation. A very narrow, razor-sharp focal plane cuts horizontally through the mid-ground, rendering edges with hyper-crisp precision and high-contrast detail. Immediately outside this focal band, the image rapidly dissolves into heavy, buttery smooth bokeh, blurring both the extreme foreground and distant background into soft, glowing gradients. The sense of scale is aggressively manipulated to feel tiny and toy-like. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners, photorealistic, tilt-shift photography, miniature diorama, macro lens, shallow depth of field, heavy bokeh, high chroma, physical scale model, toy-like illusion, pristine textures, glowing practical lights, optical blur, forced perspective, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A pure environmental backdrop styled as a miniature diorama terrain setting, featuring a heavily blurred, out-of-focus landscape with extreme macro bokeh. Soft, diffused studio-style lighting illuminates smooth, toy-like geometric shapes and pristine surfaces. The color palette relies on a {{primary_color}} foundation, punctuated by vibrant {{accent_color}} highlights that mimic tiny, distant glowing lights, while deep {{secondary_color}} shadows provide structural grounding. The entire scene is bathed in a dramatic, shallow depth of field gradient, transitioning from soft atmospheric blur to extreme circular bokeh, creating a whimsical, scale-model atmosphere devoid of any distinct foreground subject or focal point.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure environmental backdrop styled as a miniature diorama terrain setting, featuring a heavily blurred, out-of-focus landscape with extreme macro bokeh. Soft, diffused studio-style lighting illuminates smooth, toy-like geometric shapes and pristine surfaces. The color palette relies on a {{primary_color}} foundation, punctuated by vibrant {{accent_color}} highlights that mimic tiny, distant glowing lights, while deep {{secondary_color}} shadows provide structural grounding. The entire scene is bathed in a dramatic, shallow depth of field gradient, transitioning from soft atmospheric blur to extreme circular bokeh, creating a whimsical, scale-model atmosphere devoid of any distinct central focal point. A decorative, slightly out-of-focus architectural framing element borders the extreme foreground, casting subtle shadows and transitioning seamlessly into the flat {{background_color}} surface behind the invisible central subject area.
